strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and React (Optilyz, re:cinq)
Strong background in scalable architectures, microservices, and DevOps (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
Proven track record in cross-functional collaboration and mentorship (Altom, GISCollective)
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (resume highlights MongoDB, MySQL)
Overqualified for junior/mid-level role (e.g., Staff Engineer at re:cinq, Senior roles at Optilyz)
May lack recent hands-on experience with React/Nest.js if current focus is on AI-agent infrastructure
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise and pragmatic architecture skills, with strong TypeScript, React, and modern DevOps practices (AWS, Kubernetes). However, their senior-level experience (Staff Engineer, Senior roles) and limited PostgreSQL exposure may not align perfectly with the junior/mid-level role's requirements, despite their ability to quickly adapt.
